title: Rhythm: home row words
text: ask ask ask sad sad sad lad lad lad jak jak jak fall fall fall ask sad lad jak fall
tips: Same word three times = rhythm practice
Like clapping along to a song
Don't speed up — just stay steady

character_tips.anna: Rhythm like a song — clap-clap-clap, type-type-type 🌷
character_tips.knopych: RHYTHM MODE! 🥁 Same word, same beat!
character_tips.klavochka: Like a little song, my dear 🎵 Tap-tap-tap!
